title: rhus divaricata
intro: Rhus divaricata, also known as the creeping sumac or spreading sumac, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Anacardiaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema, acne, and wounds due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Rhus divaricata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and relieve stress and anxiety. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
